title: BEM-865 writer candidates markers
objective:
Run script:
"""
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_writer_candidates')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for root in ['.github/workflows', 'tools', 'scripts', 'governance']:
    p = Path(root)
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    for f in p.rglob('*'):
        if count >= 30:
            break
        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in ['.py', '.yml', '.yaml', '.ts', '.js', '.md', '.json']:
            name = str(f)
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:50000]
            low = (name + '\n' + text).lower()
            if ('claude' in low or 'anthropic' in low or 'from_claude' in low or 'claude_internal_audit' in low) and ('from_claude' in low or 'claude_internal' in low or 'anthropic' in low):
                safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in name)[:120]
                marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(2) + '_' + safe + '.md')
                flags = []
                for token in ['from_claude', 'CLAUDE_INTERNAL_AUDIT', 'anthropic', 'write_text', 'workflow_dispatch', 'contents/']:
                    if token.lower() in low:
                        flags.append(token)
                marker.write_text('# BEM-865 writer candidate\nPath: ' + name + '\nFlags: ' + ', '.join(flags) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
                changed_files.append(str(marker))
                count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_WRITER_CANDIDATES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 writer candidates index\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\nDirectory: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_writer_candidates\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('writer candidate markers created: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
